---
title: "Abdul Baari Bakpa"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:abdulbaari.bakpa@sciencespo.fr
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/abdulbaaribakpa
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: "#"
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: "#"
---

## Welcome

I am a graduate student in economics at **Sciences Po, Paris**. My research sits at the intersection of **development economics, trade, and environmental economics**, with a focus on Sub-Saharan Africa.

My current work studies how **market access shapes deforestation** in Ghana, combining a structural trade model with high-resolution satellite data and a panel instrumental-variable strategy.

## Research Interests

- Development economics
- Trade and spatial economics
- Environmental and natural-resource economics
- Applied econometrics & remote sensing

## News

- **Apr 2026** — Working on the job-market version of my paper on market access and forest loss in Ghana.
- **2025** — Joined the MA in Economics at Sciences Po.
